name: OC3 monopile eigenvalue
notes: Op3 Mode A (fixed)

name: NREL 5MW tripod eigenvalue
notes: Op3 Mode A (fixed)

name: IEA 15MW monopile eigenvalue
notes: Op3 Mode A (fixed)

name: Centrifuge 22-case eigenvalue
notes: mean error 1.19%, max 4.47% across 5 soil conditions and scour depths 0-0.6 S/D. See Ch 3 Table 3.4.

name: PISA Dunkirk sand (design domain boundary)
notes: Op3 is calibrated for L/D ~ 0.5-1.0 suction buckets. PISA Dunkirk piles (L/D=3-5) are outside the design domain. The PISA clay benchmarks (#6, L/D~3) work because undrained clay stiffness is less sensitive to L/D than drained sand. See PISA Cowden clay (#6) for in-domain comparison (+16-32%).

name: Houlsby VH envelope (pure H, L/D=0.5)
notes: Verified through benchmark #15 (Vulpe 2015). OptumGX NcH=3.847 vs Vulpe NcH=4.17 (-7.8%). Villalobos (2009) model-scale H_norm=0.12 uses different normalization; direct comparison requires matching interface/scale conditions.

name: Zaaijer tripod scour sensitivity (S/D=1.0)
notes: Zaaijer used analytical SSI (Irene Vorrink / Lely). Op3 uses centrifuge-calibrated power law.

name: Prendergast monopile scour-frequency (S/D=1.0)
notes: Published range: 5.0-10.0%. Op3 prediction 5.9% falls within the published range.

name: Weijtjens field frequency detection
notes: Weijtjens: <2% detectable on monopiles after EOV. Op3 Ch 5: 70.1% scatter reduction, 95% detection at 0.39D (~2.3% frequency change at Gunsan).

name: DNV-ST-0126 1P/3P band (NREL 5MW OC3)
notes: 1P=0.202Hz, 3P=0.605Hz, f1=0.324Hz. Within the soft-stiff band.

name: DNV-ST-0126 1P/3P band (Gunsan 4.2MW)
notes: 1P=0.220Hz, 3P=0.660Hz, f1=0.244Hz. Within the soft-stiff band.

name: Fu & Bienen NcV surface (d/D=0)
source: Fu & Bienen (2017) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: OptumGX 3D limit analysis, D=10m, su=50kPa, 6000 elements, 3 adaptivity iterations.

name: Fu & Bienen NcV embedded (d/D=0.5)
source: Fu & Bienen (2017) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: OptumGX 3D limit analysis, D=10m, S=5m (d/D=0.5), su=50kPa, 8000 elements, 3 adaptivity.

name: Vulpe NcV (d/D=0.5, kappa=0, rough)
foundation_type: skirted circular foundation in NC clay
notes: OptumGX 3D limit analysis, D=10m, S=5m, su=50kPa, rough interface, 10000 elements.

name: Vulpe NcH (d/D=0.5, kappa=0, rough)
foundation_type: skirted circular foundation in NC clay
notes: OptumGX 3D limit analysis, D=10m, S=5m, su=50kPa, rough interface, 10000 elements.

name: Vulpe NcM (d/D=0.5, kappa=0, rough)
foundation_type: skirted circular foundation in NC clay
notes: OptumGX 3D limit analysis, D=10m, S=5m, su=50kPa, rough interface, 10000 elements.

name: Jalbi KL (5MW, L/D=0.5, Es=40MPa)
notes: Jalbi Table 2 regression (homogeneous soil). Gs=15.38MPa, R=6.0m, L/D=0.5.

name: Jalbi KR (5MW, L/D=0.5, Es=40MPa)
notes: Jalbi Table 2 regression (homogeneous soil). Gs=15.38MPa, R=6.0m, L/D=0.5.

name: Gazetas KH (L=R=10m, G=5MPa)
source: Efthymiou & Gazetas (2018) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Op3 Efthymiou 2018 implementation. L=R=10m, G=5MPa, nu=0.5, H=30m.

name: Gazetas KR (L=R=10m, G=5MPa)
source: Efthymiou & Gazetas (2018) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Op3 Efthymiou 2018 implementation. L=R=10m, G=5MPa, nu=0.5, H=30m.

name: Achmus Hu pure horizontal (L/D=0.75, dense sand)
source: Achmus et al. (2013) Applied Ocean Research
foundation_type: suction bucket in very dense sand
notes: OptumGX 3D limit analysis, D=12m, L=9m, phi=40, MohrCoulomb nonassociated.

name: Bothkennar clay Kr (Gibson, L/D=0.5)
source: Houlsby et al. (2005) Proc ICE Geotech Eng
notes: D=3m, L=1.5m, su=15+1.9z kPa. Efthymiou Gibson model. Underpredicts because Gibson assumes G(0)=0 while Bothkennar has finite surface strength. Homogeneous overpredicts at +71%.

name: Doherty/OxCaisson KL L/D=0.5 nu=0.2
source: Doherty et al. (2005) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Op3 Efthymiou & Gazetas (2018) vs Doherty 3D FE.

name: Doherty/OxCaisson KR L/D=0.5 nu=0.2
source: Doherty et al. (2005) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Op3 Efthymiou & Gazetas (2018) vs Doherty 3D FE.

name: Doherty/OxCaisson KL L/D=1.0 nu=0.2
source: Doherty et al. (2005) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Op3 Efthymiou & Gazetas (2018) vs Doherty 3D FE.

name: Doherty/OxCaisson KR L/D=1.0 nu=0.2
source: Doherty et al. (2005) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Op3 Efthymiou & Gazetas (2018) vs Doherty 3D FE.

name: p_ult(z) profile consistency (Hmax, d/D=0.5)
notes: NcH=3.846, avg Np=2.09. Skirt carries 69.1%, lid+tip carry the remainder. Profile shape consistent with shallow mechanism (Np~2 for L/D=0.5).
